title: House Committee Advances Bill with 45Z Extension
content: The House Ways and Means Committee on May 14 advanced its portion of President Trumpâ€™s â€œbig, beautifulâ€ tax bill. The draft legislation amends and extends the 45Z clean fuel production credit but repeals several other clean energy tax credits. The existing 45Z tax credit, established by the Inflation Reduction Act of 2022, provides a tax credit for the production and sale of low-emission transportation fuels.
author: Analysts Account
